query: mutation(\: String\!) { updateServiceConfigFile(serviceID: "69882d49ea91e8e06ef108dc", environmentID: "698822fd2579f38ed02c5f58", path: "/root/.config/mihomo/config.yaml", content: \) }

variables.content:
mixed-port: 7890
bind-address: "0.0.0.0"
allow-lan: true
mode: rule
log-level: info
external-controller: 0.0.0.0:9090
external-ui: ui

proxy-providers:
  airport:
    type: http
    url: "https://link123.52pokemon99.cc/api/v1/client/subscribe?token=18e0f571b3925aac53e9037633e6449e"
    interval: 3600
    path: ./proxy_provider/airport.yaml
    exclude-filter: "流量|重置|到期|建议|官网"
    health-check:
      enable: true
      interval: 300
      url: https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204

proxy-groups:
  - name: "Proxy"
    type: select
    proxies:
      - Auto
    use:
      - airport

  - name: "Auto"
    type: url-test
    use:
      - airport
    url: https://www.gstatic.com/generate_204
    interval: 300

rules:
  - MATCH,Auto
